notes: All 17 workspace.bats tests pass. shellcheck exits 0 with no diagnostics. lib/workspace.sh correctly defines WORKSPACE_DIRS, WORKSPACE_REQUIRED_INPUTS, and WORKSPACE_OUTPUT_FILES per ADR-001. bootstrap_workspace uses mkdir -p and conditional touch. validate_workspace iterates both collections, prints ERROR to stderr per missing item, and returns 1 on any errors. workspace_init chains both calls. All acceptance criteria met.
